items.content:
About This Role

We are looking for a Senior Site Reliability Engineer to ensure the availability, performance, and scalability of our production systems. You will be part of a team that treats reliability as a feature and applies software engineering practices to operations challenges.

Our platform serves enterprise customers who depend on us for business-critical content delivery, so uptime and performance are paramount. You will play a crucial role in keeping our SLAs and earning customer trust.

Responsibilities

  • Define and enforce SLOs, SLIs, and error budgets for production services
  • Build and improve monitoring, alerting, and incident response tooling
  • Lead post-incident reviews and drive follow-up actions to prevent recurrence
  • Automate toil and operational processes through code and tooling
  • Capacity plan for growth and optimize infrastructure costs
  • Collaborate with development teams to improve service reliability through architectural improvements

Requirements

  • 6+ years of experience in SRE, DevOps, or infrastructure engineering
  • Strong proficiency with cloud platforms (AWS preferred) and Kubernetes
  • Experience building observability stacks with tools like Prometheus, Grafana, and PagerDuty
  • Solid programming skills in Python, Go, or similar languages
  • Deep understanding of distributed systems, networking, and Linux internals

Nice to Have

  • Experience managing multi-tenant SaaS platforms with strict SLA requirements
  • Knowledge of chaos engineering practices and tools (Gremlin, Litmus)
  • Familiarity with FinOps and cloud cost optimization strategies
